movies.title: Cinema
movies.passionText1: From the grand halls of Cannes to the intimate glow of a late-night screening, cinema has always been more than entertainment — it is a way of seeing the world.
movies.passionText2: Every film is a conversation between the director and the audience. I seek out stories that challenge, inspire, and linger long after the credits roll.
movies.passionText3: These reviews are my personal reflections — not just on what happens on screen, but on what cinema makes us feel.
movies.seeAllRatings: See all my ratings on Letterboxd
